title: Stopping a stopped container is not an error for Podman
body: As the title says. We originally fixed this a long while back, and regressed after we parallelized stop.

comments.body: Will write a test in a bit - my local environment won't run the tests anymore, trying to figure out why. I think F27 might finally be too old, looking into upgrading the dev VM
Added a test. Entirely untested since they won't even compile for me. Will fix if it breaks anything.
LGTM, could you rebase to pick the fixes for the CI?
CI should be fixed, someone mind dropping a /lgtm? @giuseppe @umohnani8 @baude @rhatdan
